owner_source: BBB Business Profile with Nextdoor and Yellow Pages public profile corroboration
source_query: Raleigh NC painting public business listing
source_evidence: Collector found the public website. BBB confirms Osborne Painting Co., LLC at 8480 Honeycutt Rd STE 200, Raleigh, NC 27615, lists website/phone, says the business started 01/01/1986, incorporated 09/01/2004, is an LLC, offers interior/exterior painting for residential and commercial clients, and identifies Anthony G. "Tony" Osborne as member manager/principal/customer contact. Nextdoor corroborates Osborne Painting in Raleigh at 8480 Honeycutt Rd with phone (919) 878-6611 and says it serves Raleigh and the Triangle. Yellow Pages corroborates the same phone, website, and address and describes Anthony Osborne's company as providing interior/exterior painting and restoration services in Raleigh, Cary, Durham, and beyond.
visible_gap: Website was not readable during collection and no first-party contact form/email was captured, but public phone/profile evidence is strong; improve contact capture and estimate-request routing.
offer_angle: Painting estimate/contact-path cleanup for Triangle service area
